identificationModule.briefTitle: Randomized Evaluation and Verification of Ventricular Enhancement
identificationModule.officialTitle: Randomized Evaluation and Verification of Ventricular Enhancement: The REVIVE-HF Study

descriptionModule.briefSummary: A prospective, multi-center, dual-arm randomized controlled study comparing treatment of ischemic cardiomyopathy induced heart failure with the Revivent TC System plus Guideline Directed Medical Therapy (GDMT) compared to GDMT alone.
descriptionModule.detailedDescription: The purpose of the study is to demonstrate that treatment with the BioVentrix Revivent TC System is more effective than guideline directed medical therapy for the treatment of ischemic heart failure. This is a prospective, multi-center, dual-arm randomized controlled study comparing treatment of ischemic cardiomyopathy induced heart failure with the Revivent TC System plus Guideline Directed Medical Therapy (GDMT) compared to GDMT alone. This study will include 180 patients of which 120 patients will be treated with the investigational device and 60 patients will be maintained on GDMT.

keywords: Ischemic Cardiomyopathy, Heart Failure, Revivent TC System

designInfo.interventionModelDescription: 2:1 Randomized Study Design. Crossover permitted after 6 months.

armGroups.label: Revivent TC Ventricular Enhancement System plus GDMT
armGroups.description: Patients will receive treatment with the Revivent TC Ventricular Enhancement System while being maintained on Guideline Directed Medical Therapy for treatment of Heart Failure.
interventionNames: Device: Revivent TC Ventricular Enhancement System

armGroups.label: GDMT Only
armGroups.description: Patients will be maintained on Guideline Directed Medical Therapy for treatment of Heart Failure.

interventions.name: Revivent TC Ventricular Enhancement System
interventions.description: Anchors that are implanted into the left ventricle to reshape and reduce the size and increase the efficiency of the pumping chamber.
armGroupLabels: Revivent TC Ventricular Enhancement System plus GDMT

interventions.name: GDMT
armGroupLabels: Revivent TC Ventricular Enhancement System plus GDMT

primaryOutcomes.description: Improvement of heart failure symptoms compared to baseline as measured by changes in 6 Minute Walking Distance.

secondaryOutcomes.description: Changes in Quality of Life Index measured compared to baseline using the MLHFQ Quality of Life Questionnaire.
Changes in NYHA Heart Classification compared to baseline
Changes in left ventricular end systolic volume index (LVESVI) end diastolic volume index (LVEDVI) measured by echocardiogram compared to baseline
Changes in left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) measured by echocardiogram compared to baseline
